mapper.sql: select e.enrollment_id, e.plan_id, e.teacher_id, e.apply_date, e.approve_status, e.approve_by, e.approve_time, e.approve_remark, e.create_by, e.create_time, p.plan_name, t.teacher_name, d.dept_name from tea_training_enrollment e left join tea_training_plan p on p.plan_id = e.plan_id left join tea_teacher t on t.teacher_id = e.teacher_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = t.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into tea_training_enrollment(plan_id, teacher_id, apply_date, approve_status, create_by, create_time )values(#{planId}, #{teacherId}, #{applyDate}, #{approveStatus}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
